description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped stone with a rugged, angular form and a mix of dark gray and off-white coloration. The surface is mottled with speckles and patches, giving it a natural, weathered appearance typical of stones found in urban landscaping or construction. One side features a prominent dark gray area with a rough, almost fractured texture, while the rest of the stone displays lighter tones interspersed with darker flecks. The stone's edges are uneven and jagged, with some smoother, worn sections suggesting exposure to the elements. Its overall mass and density are consistent with granite or basalt, making it a substantial obstacle or decorative element. The stone's visual texture and coloration would allow it to blend into both natural and built environments, such as parks, sidewalks, or garden borders.
description: A rugged, angular stone with mottled dark gray and off-white coloration, featuring rough and jagged surfaces with speckled patterns. Its natural weathered look makes it suitable for urban landscaping or as an obstacle.
description_view_0: This view highlights a prominent dark gray face with rough, fractured texture and a sharp edge on the upper left.
description_view_1: This angle shows more of the lighter, speckled surface with rounded contours and less pronounced dark areas.
description_view_2: Here, a large dark patch with a rough, indented area is visible, contrasting with the lighter, speckled stone body.
description_view_3: This side displays a mix of dark and light surfaces, with jagged edges and a more angular profile.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or obstacle on the ground
attribute_pattern: Mottled and speckled pattern with irregular dark and light patches, no artificial carvings or regular veining.
attribute_weathering: Rough and weathered with some smoother, worn sections indicating moderate exposure to natural elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Blends naturally with soil, gravel, or landscaped greenery, providing a subtle contrast to paved surfaces.
